title: चन्द्र स्तोत्रम्
devanagariText:
॥ श्री चन्द्र स्तोत्रम् ॥

दधिशंखतुषाराभं क्षीरोदार्णवसम्भवम्।
नमामि शशिनं सोमं शम्भोर्मुकुटभूषणम्॥ १॥

श्वेतवर्णं द्विभुजं चन्द्रं गदाधरमीश्वरम्।
हरिणवाहनसंस्थानं प्रणमामि निशाकरम्॥ २॥

कर्कटराशिपतिं सोमं सोमवारप्रियं सदा।
मनःकारकमीशानं प्रणमामि शशाङ्कं गुरुम्॥ ३॥

शान्तिदं शीतलं सौम्यं अमृतं कलानिधिम्।
रोहिणीवल्लभं चन्द्रं प्रणमामि निशापतिम्॥ ४॥

षोडशकलापूर्णं पूर्णिमाचन्द्रसुन्दरम्।
सर्वरोगहरं देवं प्रणमामि चन्द्रं विभुम्॥ ५॥

चन्द्रस्तोत्रमिदं पुण्यं यः पठेत्सोमवासरे।
चन्द्रपीडा न बाधेत सर्वसुखमवाप्नुयात्॥

॥ इति श्री चन्द्र स्तोत्रम् सम्पूर्णम् ॥
benefits: Sacred Chandra Stotram for devotion and spiritual growth
Invokes blessings of Chandra in all forms
Grants divine protection and planetary peace
Ideal for Chandra graha shanti and worship
description: Dedicated to the Nine Planets (Navagraha), the Chandra Stotram (चन्द्र स्तोत्रम्) is a devotional hymn of praise revered in Hindu tradition. This sacred composition is sourced from Purana Tradition and continues to inspire devotees worldwide. Devotees recite this prayer to invoke blessings of Chandra in all forms and remove afflictions and bestow auspiciousness. It is also said to grant divine protection and planetary peace. For best results, devotees chant this on Monday (Somvar) and during Sharad Purnima. The text contains 5 verses and takes around 3 minutes to recite, fitting conveniently into a daily spiritual routine. On this page, you can read the complete Chandra Stotram in Devanagari Sanskrit with English transliteration, Hindi meaning (arth), and free PDF download for offline recitation.
seoDescription: Read Chandra Stotram in Sanskrit with Hindi meaning. Sacred hymn for Chandra graha shanti.
